{"user_message": {"title": "ADR-0001 Test Harness — IMPLEMENTED & GREEN (27 tests, 0 fail, ~260ms)", "content": "## Verdict
**Done — not just scoped.** The ADR-0001 plan (5 tasks · 11 pts) is now fully implemented against `local-seo-agency`, the suite is green, typecheck is clean, and a real correctness defect is fixed. ADR-0001 was the settled decision for this area; I extended it with an IMPLEMENTED addendum rather than re-deriving.

## What shipped
| # | Task | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 1 | Test runner | `tsx@^4.22.3` devDep + `"test": "node --import tsx --test \"src/**/*.test.ts\""` |
| 2 | `format.ts` tests | `src/lib/format.test.ts` — 18 tests |
| 3 | Extract `rankDelta()` | `src/features/rankings/rank.ts`; `KeywordTable.tsx` refactored to consume it |
| 4 | `rankDelta` tests + defect fix | `src/features/rankings/rank.test.ts` — 9 tests |
| 5 | NaN-guard decision | Resolved (see below) |

```chart
Tests passing: 27
Tests failing: 0
Suite runtime ms: 261
```

## Edge cases covered (not happy-path)
- **`formatSignedCurrency` U+2212 minus** — asserts the exact typographic minus `−` and explicitly asserts the result does *not* contain an ASCII hyphen. `-0` → `$0.00` (no sign).
- **Half-expand rounding** — `formatCurrency(1.005)` → `$1.01`; `formatCurrency(1234.5, false)` → `$1,235`.
- **NaN / very large** — `$NaN`, `NaN%`, and `$1,234,567.89` grouping all pinned.
- **`rankDelta`** — improve / drop / flat, large swings (±99), and non-finite inputs → `flat`/0.

## Real defect fixed (Task 4)
`KeywordTable.tsx` previously rendered rank **drops** (`now > prev`) identically to *no change* (`—`) — a keyword that lost rank looked unchanged. Now drops render **`↓ N` in `text-danger`**, improvements `↑ N` in success, flat `—`. A regression test asserts drops never collapse to `—`. No drop row exists in the current mock `data.ts`, so the live dashboard is visually unchanged today; the fix is latent-correct.

## NaN-guard decision (Task 5 — resolved)
- **`format.ts`: pinned, NOT changed.** Tests document that `$NaN`/`NaN%` currently leak to the UI. A display guard is deferred — changing money/percent rendering needs product input, and I won't silently alter it.
- **New `rankDelta`: guarded.** Non-finite input returns `flat`/0 so new code can't render garbage.

## Verification
- `npm test` → **27 pass / 0 fail** in ~260 ms (Node v24.12.0).
- `tsc --noEmit` → clean.
- ADR updated: `docs/adr/ADR-0001-test-harness-and-pure-logic-coverage.md` (Implementation addendum, 2026-05-27).

**One item for your sign-off:** Task 4 changes rendered dashboard output for any future down-move row (`↓ N` in red). Approve below before this reaches production UI.", "content_type": "success", "priority": "normal"}}
